## GroupKeySpec interface

Valid group keys per entity. The OmniJS expression returns the bucket name (string). Synthetic buckets (e.g., `dueBucket`<!-- -->) compute a coarse label.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface GroupKeySpec 
```
